title: AlexLab - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Self-listing verification logic exploited to drain liquidity pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates self-listing verification logic to bypass checks

monitoring_rules: Monitor for self-listing verification logic manipulation attempts
summary: AlexLab was exploited through a flaw in their self-listing verification logic, allowing attackers to bypass checks and drain liquidity pools. A critical monitoring rule should block any transaction that manipulates self-listing verification logic to bypass checks.
